cards.name: Push Hard
cards.rulesText: Push the car to its limits: gain 2 positions, +15 tire wear.

cards.name: Pit Call
cards.rulesText: Pit stop! Lose 4 positions but fresh tires with extra life.

cards.name: Conserve Tires
cards.rulesText: Manage the rubber: lose 1 position, -15 tire wear.

cards.name: Overtake
cards.rulesText: Send it down the inside! Gain 3 positions, +25 tire wear.

cards.name: Defend Position
cards.rulesText: Hold the racing line: keep position, +5 tire wear from defensive driving.

cards.name: Aero Boost
cards.rulesText: Aero boost! Gain 2 positions, +10 tire wear.

cards.name: Slipstream
cards.rulesText: Tow from the car ahead: gain 1 position, no tire cost.

cards.name: Late Brake
cards.rulesText: Brake late into the corner! Gain 3 positions, +20 tire wear.

cards.name: Gap Management
cards.rulesText: Control the pace: hold position, -10 tire wear.

cards.name: Undercut
cards.rulesText: Early pit strategy: gain 1 position, standard fresh tires.

cards.name: Engine Mode
cards.rulesText: Turn up the engine: gain 1 position, +10 tire wear.

cards.name: Alternate Strategy
cards.rulesText: Opposite strategy to rivals: lose 2 positions, tires with extra life.
